mechanism_explained: Interleaved structure: teacher build + classroom activity per chapter so the teacher does the same discipline they teach
The agentic loop (gather context, plan, execute, verify, repeat) with Ask Mode / Code Mode as the human interruption point
AGENTS.md is auto-loaded by Codex at session start; 32 KiB combined-size limit; 200-line effective ceiling for instruction-following
The five-element specification format (operation, invariants, context, output format, negative constraint) converts intent into prompts Codex can act on
Handoff conditions: specific, testable, binary checks between build steps; the revert-and-respecify rule after two failed corrections
Five named supervisory capacities (PA, PF, TO, IJ, EI) decompose the human work that is structurally weak for current LLMs
Generate multiple Codex responses to the same task; evaluate against pedagogical criteria not in the spec; the selection judgment is the irreducibly human work
Full conducting discipline applied to the grading-tool build across five phases; AGENTS.md grows; each phase has spec + handoff + capacity label

The dangerous middle: outputs that pass every handoff condition and are still wrong; ESL/AAVE bias data shows where the disagreement clusters; narrowing principle (Codex flags patterns; teacher writes feedback)
Codex task queue runs parallel tasks in isolated cloud contexts; each return requires the same supervisory evaluation as a main-session output
The motivation shift from productivity (faster teacher work) to possibility (classroom experiences that didn't previously exist) — Seth's voice carries the bridge
Brutalist three-file system (AGENTS.md technical, DESIGN.md visual, PROJECT.md intent layer) separates three concerns and protects against Codex's improvisation drift
Full conducting discipline applied at simulation scale; screenshot-iterate for visual states; the scope-creep moment handled by logging to PROJECT.md Layer 2
The three-check verification (first-30-seconds; informative failure states; progression from easy to hard) closes the gap between works-on-my-terminal and works-in-classroom
Build-log-as-assessment shifts the graded artifact from the code to the supervisory work; the teacher's three built artifacts become teaching material
Post-build document (five sections) consolidates the build's lessons; AGENTS.md plus post-build document are the two artifacts the teacher carries forward
